column1: 失敗してこそ、成功の喜びが分かる。
column2: しっぱいしてこそ、せいこうのよろこびがわかる。
column3: It is only by failing that you truly understand the joy of success.
column4: てこそ (only by ~ing, it is precisely because of ~ing that)
column6: emphatic expression that a certain action is the precise and necessary condition for a result; 'only when you do X does Y become real'
column8: てこそ = X is the essential enabling condition; てはじめて = only after doing (sequential discovery); からこそ = precisely because (cause emphasis); てこそあり = same formal form
